full_text:
Emperor Huan [Liu Zhi] 桓帝[劉志]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Huan [Liu Zhi] (桓帝[劉志]). Emperor Huan of the Han. Destroyed the Liang family, but empowered the eunuchs. Emperor Huan [Liu Zhi] was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Huan [Liu Zhi] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
